allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'assistant' or \(obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('role'\) == 'assistant'\): content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:2000]\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(content[:2000]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\) and msg.get\('role'\) == 'assistant': content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:3000]\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content: print\(content[:3000]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): role = msg.get\('role', ''\) content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if role in \('user', 'assistant'\): if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]:', c['text'][:2000]\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content: print\(f'[{role}]:', content[:2000]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
